caption: $m_{4\ell}$ [GeV] small-slice shape comparison. The distributions use at most 1000 entries per primary ROOT file and are area-normalized only for Phase 1 shape reconnaissance, not for yield validation. Large differences here flag candidate variables for Phase 2/3 data-MC quality checks rather than final selection conclusions.
